description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a slanted roof composed of alternating light and dark gray panels. The front facade is dominated by a large, floor-to-ceiling glass window, providing ample natural light and a view into the interior. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a striped green and black base, suggesting a stylized lawn or garden. The sides of the building are mostly solid, with a few small, rectangular windows, while the rear has a single small window near the roofline. The exterior walls appear to be clad in dark materials, likely wood or composite panels, giving the building a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall form is compact and single-storied, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a slanted roof, large front glass window, and dark exterior cladding, set on a striped green and black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large glass window and the main entrance, with the slanted roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying solid dark walls with two small rectangular windows and the striped base.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a single small window near the roof and the angular roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two grouped windows and a small angled window near the top.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front window and small side/rear windows
